data.title: Canadian auto sector hit by U.S. trade policy, pressuring agreement allowing Chinese car sales, harming U.S. automakers.
data.description: The Canadian auto industry has witnessed significant impact due to U.S. trade policies, leading the country to negotiate an agreement facilitating an easier entry for Chinese auto companies to sell cars there.

data.title: USD1 stablecoin from World Liberty Financial surpasses PayPal's PYUSD, as announced by Eric Trump, marking a significant milestone in the digital dollar realm. Eric Trump stated that the shift towards USD1 is occurring.
data.description: Eric Trump announced that USD1, the stablecoin issued by World Liberty Financial, has surpassed PayPal Holdings Inc.'s PYUSD stablecoin in size, marking a significant milestone. He emphasized this achievement as a crucial phase in the evolution of digital currencies, stating, "The shift is happening." Eric Trump further highlighted the growth of USD1, positioning it as one of the leading digital dollar platforms globally. He stressed that this advancement signifies more than just a crypto milestone, as it indicates a progression towards shaping the future of global finances. The announcement was made on January 23, 2026, and the full details are accessible via Benzinga.com.

data.title: Compare train vs. plane costs; Amtrak benefits from dynamic pricing. Passengers complain at high last-minute fares.[train emoji] has advantage of skipping airport.
data.description: Amtrak has reported that the implementation of dynamic pricing has significantly improved its financial performance. However, many travelers express dissatisfaction with the high prices, particularly for last-minute bookings. Despite this, Amtrak has a significant advantage in its ability to bypass the airport hassle.

data.title: Market analysis report on North America B2C & B2B E-Commerce, Payments & AI until 2026. Wallet usage rises, cards lead in revenue.
data.description: A report titled "North America B2C & B2B E-Commerce, Payments & AI" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report delves into the impact of digital commerce, the changing payments sector, artificial intelligence, and B2B online trading on retail, financial services, and corporate functions in North America. It provides detailed insights into market growth, transaction platforms, consumer and business patterns, AI incorporation, and cross-sector trends.

data.title: Advyzon partners with Schwab Asset Management, offering Wasmer Schroeder Strategies, providing broad range of portfolio strategies.
data.description: In Chicago, AIM, a unified investment solutions platform under Advyzon, has partnered with Schwab Asset Management® to offer Wasmer Schroeder® Strategies. This collaboration introduces a range of portfolio strategies encompassing duration, credit, and tax-efficiency options. Wasmer Schroeder Strategies by Schwab Asset Management is the initial fixed income-focused addition to Advyzon's wealthtech platform.

data.title: $1.81bn AI drug discovery market to reach $41.08bn by 2040: ResearchAndMarkets.com. CAGR of 25%; driven by innovations.
data.description: A report on the AI in Drug Discovery Market predicts significant expansion, with the global market expected to grow from $1.81 billion in the current year to $41.08 billion by 2040, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25%. Innovations such as virtual screening, predictive modeling, and others are driving this growth. The report covers the distribution by drug discovery steps, therapeutic areas, and key geographical regions. It highlights industry trends and global forecasts in this sector.

data.title: Yolando, a GEO platform, launches commercially with $8.5M funding from Drive Capital to help companies improve visibility.
data.description: Yolando, a competitive intelligence and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform, has officially launched in Toronto with a total funding of $8.5 million USD from Drive Capital. The platform aids companies in enhancing their visibility on AI platforms and traditional search by analyzing how they are featured in AI-generated responses. Yolando offers continuous monitoring of competitors, strategic suggestions, and generates on-brand content to help companies improve their online presence.

data.title: Marketing expert Charles R. Taylor available to discuss trends in 2026 Super Bowl ads, set to cost record $8M for 30 sec.
data.description: In Villanova, Pennsylvania, Professor Charles R. Taylor from the Villanova School of Business is ready to analyze the latest trends influencing the upcoming Super Bowl advertising blitz. With brands gearing up to shell out a historic $8 million for just half a minute of airtime during the event, the stakes are higher than ever. This record-breaking expenditure will undoubtedly shape the advertising strategies and campaign dynamics observed during this year's big game.

data.title: Dime declares plan to redeem subordinated debt and reauthorize share buyback program.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the government has allocated $10 million towards funding for research and development in renewable energy sources. This investment is part of a larger initiative to combat climate change and promote sustainability. Additionally, the Department of Education has announced a $5 million grant program to support STEM education in schools across the country. These efforts aim to enhance innovation and prepare future generations for careers in science and technology. The government's commitment to investing in clean energy and education underscores the importance of addressing environmental challenges and fostering a skilled workforce.

data.title: KeepZone AI, a subsidiary of Jeffs' Brands, lands first commercial order for an anti-drone system from a Mexican aerospace integrator.
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, Jan. 26, 2026 - Jeffs' Brands Ltd (“Jeffs’ Brands” or “the Company”) operating on the Amazon Marketplace is venturing into the global homeland security sector with AI-driven solutions. The subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc., (“KeepZone”), secured its initial purchase order for a counter-unmanned aerial system (“C-UAS”) solution from an aerospace systems integrator in Mexico. The Company, listed on Nasdaq as JFBR and JFBRW, is making strides in expanding its e-commerce business to tackle security challenges, with KeepZone at the forefront of these efforts.

data.title: Tellabs to showcase at Rocky Mountain Cyberspace Symposium 2026, revealing significant body of work for govt and defense networks.
data.description: A showcase is set to highlight the capabilities of Tellabs Optical LAN and provide a sneak peek of a significant announcement for government and defense networks. Located in Carrollton, Texas, the exhibition will take place on January 26, 2026. Tellabs revealed its participation in the Rocky Mountain Cyberspace Symposium 2026, where they will unveil the latest innovations. Visit the event to learn more about Tellabs' cutting-edge solutions for enhancing network functionality in government and defense sectors.
Ownership disclosure form completed for Picton Property Income Limited under Form 8.3.

data.title: Graham Corporation buys FlackTek, boosting engineered products; acquisitions expand materials processing capabilities.
data.description: Batavia, New York - Graham Corporation (NYSE: GHM), a prominent company specializing in critical fluid, power, heat transfer, and vacuum technologies for the Defense, Energy & Process, and Space industries, has revealed the acquisition of FlackTek Manufacturing, LLC and FlackTek Sales, LLC ("FlackTek"). FlackTek, known for its innovative mixing and material processing solutions, strengthens Graham Corporation's portfolio. This addition marks advanced materials processing as a new core focus for GHM.

data.title: Onity Group offers $150 million of Senior Notes due 2029 through its subsidiaries PHH Corporation and PHH Escrow Issuer LLC.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in West Palm Beach, Florida, Onity Group Inc. revealed that its subsidiaries PHH Corporation and PHH Escrow Issuer LLC have initiated an offer of $150 million in total principal amount of 9.875% Senior Notes due 2029 (referred to as the “PHH Senior Notes”). This offering is contingent on various factors including market conditions. Onity Group Inc. trades on the NYSE under the symbol ONIT.

data.title: Pulsenmore and Clalit Health collaborate for at-home follicular monitoring service for IVF, valued at $4.5 million over 5 years.
data.description: A commercial deal worth around $4.5 million is on the horizon for Pulsenmore Ltd. Following an 18-month pilot, this agreement is projected to span five years. The service is set to be rolled out through Beilinson NEXT, Beilinson's virtual hospital located in Ramat Gan, Israel. Pulsenmore Ltd., a global company listed on NASDAQ as PLSM and TASE as PLSM, announced the details on Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: Sealed Air celebrates National Bubble Wrap® Appreciation Day with a Big Game "Pop Pack" activation. Stock symbol: NYSE: SEE.
data.description: Founder pays tribute to the company's heritage by launching an innovative "Pop Pack" campaign for the Big Game, aimed at energizing and involving supporters. Based in CHARLOTTE, N.C., on Jan. 26, 2026, Sealed Air Corporation (NYSE: SEE) commemorates National Bubble Wrap® Appreciation Day, acknowledging its...

data.title: Forgent Power Solutions launching IPO roadshow for 39,413,177 shares of Class A common stock by Neos Partners-controlled entities.
data.description: Forgent Power Solutions, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of electrical distribution equipment for data centers and industrial facilities, has commenced its roadshow for the initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The offering includes 39,413,177 shares of Class A common stock from parent entities controlled by Neos Partners.

data.title: G2 Consulting Group buys Construction Testing Services, enhancing presence in Bay Area and Thumb Region. Acquisition marks company's expansion.
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, a prominent company, G2 Consulting Group, widely recognized for its geotechnical, environmental, and construction engineering services, recently disclosed its acquisition of Construction Testing Services. The latter, a well-regarded engineering services firm boasting over four decades of experience, was seen as a strategic move by G2 Consulting Group to strengthen its position in the industry. The deal, finalized on January 26, 2026, underscores G2 Consulting Group’s commitment to growth and expanding its offerings.
